productDecision.decision: FLOW-20 Ads Platform can proceed through the mobility/auth protocol after repairing pre-existing service inheritance and tenant-context coupling defects.
notes: Functional spec marks FLOW-20 half-built from a product/UI standpoint, but server-side consent, auction, fraud, and political review services have test coverage and can be certified for mobility/auth behavior.
Role analysis identifies three full cells and five partial UI/persona cells; canonical auth probes use protected run-trace roles while visual evidence must cover the ads-specific persona surfaces.

changes: Extended all four FLOW-20 services from MicroserviceBase with T625-T628 service descriptors.
Replaced direct ClsService and TENANT_CONTEXT_KEY imports with TenantContextResolver.
Kept a legacy get(tenant) fallback so existing test harnesses remain compatible while production paths use the resolver.
Renamed injected database and queue members to dbFabric and queueFabric to avoid MicroserviceBase accessor collisions.
